justification: The diff successfully migrates javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces, upgrades Spring Boot to 3.x (Java 21 compatible), and modernizes Spring Security configuration by removing the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter. It also adds @Serial annotations for serialVersionUID fields, which is a Java 14+ idiom. However, it leaves a manual migration comment in SecurityConfig.java (line 33) and doesn't fully clean up all deprecated patterns (e.g., some @Autowired annotations remain on fields in JdbcPizzaRepoImpl.java). The diff is coherent with minimal spurious churn.
